name: luoome
description: luoome —— 本地优先的个人投资管理 advisor agent（罗网 + 织机）

scripts.typecheck: for d in packages/* apps/*; do if find "$d" -maxdepth 4 -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | grep -q .; then echo "== typecheck $d"; (cd "$d" && tsc --noEmit) || exit 1; fi; done
scripts.build: for d in packages/* apps/*; do if [ -f "$d/src/index.ts" ]; then echo "== build $d"; bun build "$d/src/index.ts" --outdir "$d/dist" --target bun --packages external || exit 1; fi; done
